compare_recent_downdetector_report_volum: Compare recent Downdetector report volume against a company's baseline to detect abnormal spikes.
continuously_watch_a_set_of_critical_ven: Continuously watch a set of critical vendors on Downdetector and alert when any goes into an outage state.
cursor_for_the_next_page_of_paginated_re: Cursor for the next page of paginated results (null on the last page)
describe_the_end_time_e_g_now_end: Describe the end time (e.g. "now", "end of yesterday")...
describe_the_start_time_e_g_24_hours: Describe the start time (e.g. "24 hours ago", "start of today")...
iso_8601_end_of_the_time_range: ISO 8601 end of the time range
iso_8601_start_of_the_time_range: ISO 8601 start of the time range
list_of_companies_search_or_site_compani: List of companies (search or site companies)
look_up_a_service_on_downdetector_and_re: Look up a service on Downdetector and report whether it is currently experiencing an outage.
monitor_outages_and_service_status_with_: Monitor outages and service status with Downdetector
number_of_reports_over_the_last_15_minut: Number of reports over the last 15 minutes
opaque_page_token_for_site_companies_pag: Opaque page token for site companies pagination
opaque_token_from_a_previous_response_x_: Opaque token from a previous response (X-Page-Next)
pull_downdetector_incidents_for_a_servic: Pull Downdetector incidents for a service and record them in a structured incident log.
track_real_time_service_outages_with_the: Track real-time service outages with the Downdetector Enterprise API. Search monitored companies, read their current status and report trends, inspect problem indicators, and pull incident timelines to power outage alerts and dashboards. Requires a Downdetector Enterprise API plan.
